{{Object | Name=Souvenir Stand | Guid=3055-7751 | Deck=The Souvenir Stand is a researchable amenity in Jurassic Park: Operation Genesis. It gives souvenirs to the visitors. <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3809695-5482486245-sddef.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Souvenir Stand is a researchable amenity in Jurassic Park: Operation Genesis. It gives souvenirs to the visitors. The options are the JP Balloon, JP Fun Bag, and Dinosaur Toy. The player can also give out a free gift.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Stone Tablet | Guid=3055-7643 | Deck=Massive stone plates and clay tablets designed to record messages, usually rectangular in shape. Sometimes the player is allowed to write on them himself. | Characters=Characters/Moses | Concepts=Concepts/Alien_Language,Concepts/Ancient_Advanced_Civilization_Technology,Concepts/Drawing,Concepts/Fictional_Language,Concepts/Mythology,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Roman_Empire,Concepts/Rune,Concepts/Substitution_Cipher | Franchises= | Games=Games/Blade_of_Darkness,Games/Conkers_Bad_Fur_Day,Games/Dark_Savior,Games/Grabbed_by_the_Ghoulies,Games/Injustice_2,Games/Injustice_Gods_Among_Us,Games/Lady_Stalker_Kako_kara_no_Chousen,Games/Mega_Man_Star_Force_2,Games/Myst_V_End_of_Ages,Games/Night_at_the_Museum_Battle_of_the_Smithsonian,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_1988,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_2004,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_Black,Games/Pentagram,Games/Riglas,Games/Rogue_Galaxy,Games/Rune,Games/Rune_II_Decapitation_Edition,Games/The_Dig,Games/The_Legend_of_Zelda_Majoras_Mask,Games/Threads_of_Fate | Locations=Locations/Ancient_Greece,Locations/Atlantis,Locations/Babylon,Locations/Egypt,Locations/The_Ancient_World | People= | Objects=Objects/Clay,Objects/Stone | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3657656-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B0_12-02-2024_02.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3657656-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0430_12-02-2024_02.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Myst V: End of Ages"},"background":[]}' /> Solid tablets on which information is written by tapping or drawing, in video games it is usually something mysterious and sublime, like sacred moral teachings and coded runes. In the history of mankind they were used in ancient times before the invention of paper, which expresses backwardness, but in virtual worlds they can be on the contrary made a symbol of [[Concepts/Ancient_Advanced_Civilization_Technology|advancedness]], as when they address the theme of dead advanced civilizations like Atlantis.

{{Object | Name=Subaru Impreza WRC | Guid=3055-7493 | Deck=The Subaru Impreza WRC is a World Rally Car based on the Subaru Impreza road car. It was used by Subaru World Rally Team, Subaru's factory team, and replaced the Subaru Legacy RS in 1993. The car was debuted at 1993 Rally Finland and won a total of six world rally titles, including three consecutive manufacturers' titles and three drivers' titles. | Characters=Characters/Colin_McRae,Characters/Kenneth_Erikkson | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/Rally,Concepts/Subaru | Franchises= | Games=Games/Car_Town,Games/Colin_McRae_Rally,Games/Colin_McRae_Rally_2_0,Games/Colin_McRae_Rally_2013,Games/Colin_McRae_Rally_3,Games/Dirt_5,Games/Dirt_Rally_2_0,Games/EA_Sports_WRC,Games/Enthusia_Professional_Racing,Games/Gran_Turismo,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_4_Prologue,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/Gran_Turismo_Concept_2002_Tokyo_Geneva,Games/Gran_Turismo_HD,Games/GT_Advance_2_Rally_Racing,Games/Need_for_Speed_V_Rally,Games/Need_for_Speed_V_Rally_2,Games/Network_Q_RAC_Rally_Championship,Games/R_Racing_Evolution,Games/Rally_Challenge_2000,Games/Rally_Championship,Games/Richard_Burns_Rally,Games/Sega_GT,Games/Sega_Rally_2,Games/Sega_Rally_3,Games/Shox,Games/Top_Gear_Rally_2,Games/TORCS,Games/V_Rally_3,Games/WRC_10_FIA_World_Rally_Championship,Games/WRC_2_FIA_World_Rally_Championship,Games/WRC_3,Games/WRC_Generations,Games/WRC_II_Extreme,Games/WRC_Rally_Evolved,Games/WRC_World_Rally_Championship | Locations=Locations/Japan | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car,Objects/Subaru_Impreza,Objects/Subaru_Impreza_WRX_RA_STI_version_II,Objects/Subaru_Impreza_WRX_STI | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3654785-0948039172-526.j.jpg }}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3700213-hands_resist_him.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> is a painting that was created by artist Bill Stoneham in 1972.

{{Object | Name=The Statue of Liberty | Guid=3055-7537 | Deck=When we see the statue in the game only as an object, but never once visit it or the island where it stands. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Pop_Culture_Reference,Concepts/Statue_Mimic | Franchises= | Games=Games/Ape_Escape_2,Games/Arabian_Nights,Games/Around_the_World_in_80_Days,Games/Comix_Zone,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_1988,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_Shadow,Games/Road_And_Track_presents_The_Need_for_Speed,Games/Runaway_A_Road_Adventure,Games/Shadow_Man_2econd_Coming,Games/Soccer_Kid,Games/The_Incredible_Hulk_2008,Games/Where_in_Americas_Past_is_Carmen_Sandiego | Locations=Locations/New_York_City,Locations/The_Statue_of_Liberty,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Book,Objects/Empire_State_Building,Objects/Golden_Gate_Bridge,Objects/Statue,Objects/Torch | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3642926-5829734607-37582.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3642926-5829734607-37582.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Mostly because it's a fake or an easter egg as when its recognizable parts: the head, the torch are lying around in the wrong place. For example: - it appears far in the background of the level - it is on a picture standing in the room or a poster on the wall - it is there as a miniature figure or a model for a child's constructor - is a cardboard statue in amusement parks - we fly over it in a helicopter in a video clip, etc.
